summary: When using EXEC_NPU_CMD in python_bind_src, do not pass bool literals like false directly. The helper macro converts arguments through non-const lvalue references, so a temporary bool causes pybind compilation to fail. Store the flag in a local variable such as bool transposed = false; and pass that variable instead.
